channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: Why Tesla Stock Is Falling After Earnings Beat: Huge Capital Spending Plans, Elon Musk Comments
item.description: Tesla earnings beat views but Elon Musk said capital spending will soar over the rest of 2026. Tesla stock fell Thursday after initially rising on results.

item.title: Tesla sees analyst support on strong auto margins, AI strategy after Q1 beat
item.description: Tesla Inc (NASDAQ:TSLA)’s first quarter earnings report drew a generally positive, though measured, response from analysts at Bank of America and Wedbush, who highlighted stronger-than-expected automotive margins and continued investment in autonomy and artificial intelligence as central to the...

item.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Slips; Freeport, Oceaneering Dive As Chip Stock Breakout Cools (Live Coverage)
item.description: Stock Market Today: The Dow Jones index drops Thursday after an unexpected result in jobless claims. Tesla stock sells off on Elon Musk's comments.

item.title: Tesla takes crypto hit but still delivers earnings surprise
item.description: Bitcoin drop weighs on quarterly results

item.title: Tesla Delays China FSD Approval To Third Quarter Amid Regulatory Scrutiny
item.description: China approval timeline shifts from earlier February expectations as regulators maintain caution on advanced driver-assistance technology

item.title: Elon Musk’s last manually driven Tesla will do something no other production car will do
item.description: During Tesla’s Q1 2026 earnings call on April 22, Elon Musk made a brief but notable comment about the long-awaited next generation Roadster while describing Tesla’s future vehicle lineup. “Long term, the only manually driven car will be the new Tesla Roadster,” he said. “Speaking of which, we ma...

item.title: Tesla Q1 Earnings Review: Joining The CapEx Race
CEO Elon Musk Just Delivered Bad News to Tesla Shareholders and Vehicle Owners
item.description: Tesla recently reported its 2026 first-quarter earnings results, followed by a conference call that fielded questions from investors and analysts.

item.title: AiLO Logistics Launches Tesla Semi Pilot in Live Freight Operations
item.description: Three-week deployment puts Class 8 electric truck on active freight lanes serving multiple customers. COMPTON, CA / ACCESS Newswire / April 23, 2026 / AiLO Logistics, a freight brokerage and asset-based carrier, today announced the start of a three-week ...

item.title: US Equity Indexes Fall as Geopolitical Risk Edges Up, Tesla's FY2026 CapEx Stuns Investors
item.description: US equity indexes fell in midday trading Thursday, as geopolitical risk ratcheted up in the Middle E

item.title: The Roadster Could Be the Only Tesla You Can Actually Drive—When It Arrives
item.description: Tesla CEO Elon Musk late Wednesday offered his latest update on the status of the next-generation Roadster, the sleek two-door sports car first announced in 2027, reservations for which can be currently had for a cool $50,000.

item.title: Tesla Capital Spending Boost to Eventually Bring in More Revenue, UBS Says
item.description: Tesla's (TSLA) aggressive capital spending on artificial intelligence initiatives should boost reven

item.title: Barclays Holds the Line on Tesla After Capex Shock: Is the Robotaxi Story Worth the Spend?
item.description: Barclays held its Equal Weight rating on Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) stock with a $360 price target following the company’s first-quarter report. The call reflects a clear tension: Tesla CEO Elon Musk is asking investors to fund a materially larger spending commitment while Robotaxi scaling and autonomy ...

item.title: Tesla earnings takeaways: CapEx, robots, full self-driving
item.description: Tesla (TSLA) beat earnings and revenue estimates for its first quarter of 2026 as CEO Elon Musk struck a calmer tone in the company's earnings call. In the video above, Yahoo Finance's Myles Udland and Julie Hyman share their top takeaways from the results and the earnings call.

item.title: Top Midday Stories: Tesla Shares Fall Despite Q1 Beats; ServiceNow Says Iran War Weighed on Q1 Subscription Revenue
item.description: All three major US stock indexes were down slightly in late-morning trading Thursday, as investors c

item.title: Why SpaceX Is Going to Make Elon Musk A Tesla-Sized Boatload of Money
item.description: Anyone concerned about Elon Musk’s compensation for running SpaceX can rest easy—he’ll do just fine. Details of SpaceX’s confidential initial public offering registration statement continue to leak out as bankers and analysts meet with the company ahead of its IPO roadshow, during which those ban...

item.title: Tesla Q1: Trading On Belief, Not Results
Tesla Earnings Just Reopened The Road To $415
Tesla Model YL prototype spotted on US roads for the first time
item.description: A Tesla Model YL test mule has been spotted driving on Interstate 280 in the San Francisco Bay Area, marking the first time the longer-wheelbase, 6-seat SUV has been photographed on American roads. The sighting comes despite CEO Elon Musk’s suggestion that the Model YL might never come to the US ...

item.title: Why Tesla investors should love this version of CEO Elon Musk
item.description: A subdued, super-focused Musk is what Tesla investors need in what is arguably the most important moment for the company in years.

item.title: Dow Jones Futures Fall; Tesla Stock Sinks On Elon Musk Comments
item.description: The Nasdaq hit a new high as techs led Wednesday. Tesla fell late on Elon Musk comments. Lam Research, CSX, Texas Instruments and IBM were big earnings movers overnight.

item.title: Stocks Fall Pre-Bell as US-Iran Peace Talks Stall; Traders Parse Tesla's Results
item.description: US equity futures were tracking in the red on Thursday, with no apparent signs of progress in peace

item.title: Why Is Tesla Stock Falling? Huge Capital Spending Plans, Elon Musk Comments
item.description: Tesla earnings beat views but Elon Musk said capital spending will soar over the rest of 2026. Tesla stock fell Thursday after initially rising on results.

item.title: Tesla (TSLA) quietly discloses $2 billion AI hardware company acquisition buried in filing
item.description: Tesla agreed to acquire an unnamed AI hardware company for up to $2 billion in stock and equity awards, according to a single sentence buried in its Q1 2026 10-Q filing. The company never mentioned the deal in its shareholders’ letter or during last night’s earnings call. The disclosure appeared ...

item.title: Tesla shares turn lower as higher capex overshadows Q1 beat
item.description: Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) stock fell in premarket trading on Thursday after the company significantly increased its capital expenditure plans to above $25 billion for the year, as it accelerates its shift toward artificial intelligence and robotics. The electric vehicle maker’s shares had initially mov...

item.title: Tesla, ServiceNow Show Risks of Relying on Big Tech Earnings. Here’s the Silver Lining.
item.description: Elon Musk says spending will rise, jet fuel shortage could crimp summer travel plans, Netflix to roll out new videos for mobile devices, and more news to start your day.

item.title: U.S.-Iran uncertainty weighs on markets; oil above $100; Tesla dips after earnings: Dow Jones, S&P, Nasdaq, Wall Street Futures
item.description: Futures tied to major U. S. indices pointed lower on Thursday, as uncertainty persisted over potential renewed talks between Washington and Tehran despite President Donald Trump’s decision earlier this week to extend a ceasefire.

item.title: Intel Stock Rises Again Ahead of Earnings. Thank Tesla and Elon Musk.
item.description: Intel stock has rallied sharply, but investors are focused on whether Intel can attract outside foundry customers and compete in AI chips.

item.title: Tesla Q1 revenue rises, profit grows 17%
item.description: Total revenue for the quarter increased 16% year-on-year to $22.38bn.

item.title: These Stocks Are Today’s Movers: Tesla, ServiceNow, IBM, Lam Research, and More
item.description: Tesla shares fall after the EV maker raises its capital spending guidance, while ServiceNow plunges after so-so first-quarter earnings.

item.title: Tesla announces HW4 Plus with doubled memory — will HW4 follow HW3 to the grave?
item.description: During Tesla’s Q1 2026 earnings call, CEO Elon Musk revealed that Tesla is planning an “AI4.1 or AI4 Plus” upgrade to its self-driving computer that doubles the RAM from 16 gigabytes to 32 gigabytes per chip — taking the total system memory to 64 gigabytes. The announcement came on the same call ...

item.title: Tesla selects Intel’s 14A chip process for Terafab complex
item.description: Tesla’s partnership gives Intel its first major customer for the advanced 14A chip manufacturing process.

item.title: Tesla confirms Cybercab production has started despite delays in unsupervised driving
item.description: CEO Elon Musk confirmed during Tesla’s Q1 2026 earnings call that Cybercab production has officially begun at Giga Texas. VP of Vehicle Engineering Lars Moravy confirmed that the Cybercab will not be subject to NHTSA’s 2,500-vehicle annual production cap for autonomous vehicles. more…

item.title: Tesla Inc (TSLA) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Highlights: Record Production and Strategic Investments ...
item.description: Tesla Inc (TSLA) reports significant growth in EMEA deliveries and Giga Berlin output, while navigating energy storage declines and Bitcoin impacts.

item.title: Now Even Volvo Is Putting Tesla in the Rearview Mirror?
item.description: A number of competitors have passed Tesla in a number of its big ambitions. The question is what does success look like for Tesla's semi, and can it catch back up?

item.title: Tesla profits up but growth concerns linger as Musk lays out spending plans
item.description: Tesla’s profit rose in the first quarter as its car sales rebounded from a sharp slump in 2025.View on euronews

item.title: Exclusive-SpaceX targets in-house GPUs as it warns investors of chip supply, costs
item.description: SpaceX may be tackling one of the biggest challenges in the chip business: manufacturing the keys to powering artificial intelligence called graphics processing units, or ‌GPUs. Ahead of SpaceX's $1.75 trillion IPO expected this summer, the company has warned prospective investors of its big spen...

item.title: Tesla raises spending plans, pours money into AI, chips and robots
item.description: STORY: Tesla has sharply raised its spending plan to more than $25 billion for the year, as CEO Elon Musk pours money into artificial intelligence, robotics and chips. :: File On a post-earnings call with analysts Wednesday, the billionaire said the moves were "well justified for a substantially ...

item.title: Tesla, Inc. (TSLA) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
Tesla, Inc. 2026 Q1 - Results - Earnings Call Presentation
Tesla Earnings Highlight Soaring Full Self-Driving (Supervised) Subscriptions. Here's a Look at This Catalyst -- and 3 More Surprising Figures From the Report
item.description: The electric-vehicle maker's latest quarterly update offered some real evidence that software and services could be morphing into a major catalyst for the stock.

item.title: Tesla Reframes Growth Around AI Robots And Robotaxis After Q1 Rebound
item.description: Tesla (NasdaqGS:TSLA) reported Q1 2026 results that included a rebound in profit and revenue. The company outlined a shift toward AI, robotics, and robotaxi growth, including preparations for an Optimus humanoid robot factory. Tesla announced new semiconductor manufacturing partnerships, includin...

item.title: Tesla confirmed HW3 can’t do Unsupervised FSD but there’s more to the story
item.description: Tesla has officially confirmed that early vehicles with its Autopilot Hardware 3 (HW3) will not be capable of unsupervised Full Self-Driving, while extending a path forward for legacy owners through a discounted trade-in program. The announcement came by way of Elon Musk in today’s Tesla Q1 2026 ...

item.title: Tesla pushes Optimus V3 reveal later this year – again
item.description: During Tesla’s Q1 2026 earnings call today, CEO Elon Musk confirmed that Optimus robot production will begin at Fremont in late July or August — just four months after the last Model S and X roll off the line in early May. Musk warned, however, that initial output will be “quite slow,” calling it...

item.title: Tesla takes big swing with new model in key market
item.description: Tesla is struggling mightily in India, reportedly selling just 350 Model Y's in India since it debuted last year, according to Reuters. But now the company is debuting a new version of the Model Y to help goose sales in the burgeoning EV market. Pricing due to heavy tariffs means Tesla still has ...

item.title: Tesla just increased its spending plan to $25B — here’s where the money is going
item.description: Tesla's planned capex for 2026 is three times higher than what the company has historically spent. Its CFO said, as a result, Tesla will have a negative free cash flow the rest of the year.

item.title: Tesla Earnings Beat, But TSLA Stock Falls On Elon Musk Comments; HW3.0 'Does Not Have The Capability'
item.description: Tesla earnings beat views late Wednesday. Tesla stock turned lower as CEO Elon Musk spoke on the earnings call.

item.title: Dow Jones Futures Fall After Nasdaq Hits High; Tesla Stock Sinks On Elon Musk Comments
item.description: The Nasdaq hit a new high as techs led Wednesday. Tesla fell late on Elon Musk comments. Lam Research, CSX, Texas Instruments and IBM were big earnings movers overnight.

item.title: Tesla Says It Will Need To Build Micro Factories To Retrofit Old Cars For FSD
item.description: Millions of Teslas sold between 2019 and 2023 will not be able to achieve unsupervised Full Self-Driving without the hardware upgrade.

item.title: Tesla reports higher profits, confirms hefty spending ahead
item.description: Tesla reported higher first-quarter profits Wednesday, topping expectations as it confirmed plans for massive additional investments in autonomous transport, humanoid robotics and artificial intelligence.Tesla plans to prepare its first factor to produce the humanoid robots in the second quarte.
